title: scope-discovery the self-correcting controller controller configuration
description: Configuration for the self-correcting controller (the self-correcting controller). Every field is OPTIONAL and falls through to the documented default (see DEFAULT_CONTROLLER_CONFIG in controller-config.ts). Cross-field invariants are enforced at parse time: cold_start_* must lie within the corresponding [min, max] band; low_drift_threshold <= high_drift_threshold. The controller is a pure computation (state lives in `.dw-lifecycle/scope-discovery/orchestrator-runtime/controller-state.json`).

cold_start_frequency.description: Cold-start frequency value (turns-per-loop-invocation; 1.0 = every turn). Default 1.0 — max frequency. Must lie within [frequency_min, frequency_max].

cold_start_intensity.description: Cold-start intensity value (confidence threshold for auto-disposition; 1.0 = strictest). Default 1.0 — max intensity. Must lie within [intensity_min, intensity_max].

cold_start_escalation_threshold.description: Cold-start escalation threshold (proposals below this confidence escalate to the operator). Default 0.9 — most proposals escalate until the controller earns confidence. Must lie within [escalation_min, escalation_max].

ratchet_down_rate.description: Fractional decrease per ratchet-down step (multiplied by current value). Default 0.1 — 10% per low-drift window.

ratchet_down_window.description: Number of consecutive low-drift turns before ratchet-down fires. Default 5 (operator decision 2026-05-26).

low_drift_threshold.description: Drift signal below this counts as `low` for ratchet-down accounting. Default 0.1. MUST be <= high_drift_threshold.

high_drift_threshold.description: Drift signal above this triggers immediate intensification (jump to max frequency; raise intensity). Default 0.4.

anti_thrashing_window.description: How many prior decisions the oscillation detector looks back over. Default 3 (the K in the pre-made decision).

anti_thrashing_damping_factor.description: Multiplier applied to the proposed adjustment when oscillation is detected. Default 0.5 (50% damping per the pre-made decision).

auditor_correction_high_threshold.description: Auditor-correction-rate above this triggers intensification on frequency + intensity AND raises the escalation threshold. Default 0.5.

frequency_min.description: Floor for frequency. Default 0.1 — even fully-relaxed, the controller still runs the loop once every ten turns.

intensity_min.description: Floor for intensity. Default 0.2 — even fully-relaxed, low-confidence proposals are still gated.

intensity_max.description: Ceiling for intensity. Default 1.0 (LLM-judge on every action).
